reviews.comment:
Para ser la estacion de servicio de la salida o la entrada de una ciudad esta bastante destruida y tendria me mejorar un poco la atencion no mezclar la.fila de autos con la de camiones

(Translated by Google)
For a service station at the entrance or exit of a city, it's quite run down, and they should improve their service a bit and not mix the line of cars with the line of trucks.
